description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a tall, dense hedge, providing privacy and a clear property boundary. The front features a covered porch with arched windows and a main entry door, while a driveway leads to a two-car garage with a car parked outside. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a swing set, and a picnic table, indicating a family-friendly environment. The house has a dark, gabled roof with multiple sections and white exterior walls, giving it a modern yet classic appearance. Large windows and sliding doors are visible on the side and rear, allowing for ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a fence with a gate at the front, enhancing security and curb appeal.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gabled roof, white walls, a front porch, garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and play area, all enclosed by a tall hedge and fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, arched windows, garage, driveway, and front gate.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a pool, swing set, picnic table, and the back of the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying sliding doors, backyard amenities, and the hedge boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the garage, parked car, and a clear view of the pool and backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, large sliding doors and windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with arched windows, single main door, steps, and hedge-lined approach
